home.heroSubtitle: Manage tours, discover verified guides, and handle escrow payments — all from one regulated platform built for Vietnam's tourism industry.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to start operating or start earning as a guide.
home.opStep1Desc: Sign up, complete KYC verification, and set up your operator profile.
home.opStep2Desc: Create tour requests with dates, location, requirements, and budget. Assign your team or open to the marketplace.
home.opStep3Desc: Track tours in real-time via Command Center. Payments are escrow-protected — guides get paid after completion.
home.guStep1Desc: Sign up, verify your identity, and showcase your languages, skills, and experience.
home.guStep2Desc: Browse available tours, filter by location and date, and apply to ones that match your expertise.
home.guStep3Desc: Complete the tour, receive your payout via escrow. Build your trust score with every successful tour.
home.marketplaceDesc: Open platform for operators who need to discover and hire freelance guides. Includes guide marketplace, escrow payments, SOS broadcast, and trust scoring.
home.operationsDesc: Closed ecosystem for companies who already have their own guides. No marketplace, no escrow fees. Just team management and operational tools.
home.ctaSubtitle: Join the platform designed for compliant, transparent tour operations.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Enter your details to access your dashboard.
login.heroText: Trusted tour operations — from guide matching to escrow payout, all in one platform.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: Sign up to get started with Lunavia.
signup.referralBanner: You were invited! Complete signup to receive your 7-day PRO trial.
signup.fullNameNote: ⚠️ Real names build trust. This cannot be easily changed.
signup.kycAcknowledge: I understand I must complete KYC/KYB identity verification before I can start accepting or creating tours.

footer.tagline: Tour operations and guide marketplace platform. Connecting operators and guides with trust.
